name: Suffolk Transportation Systs
carrier_operation: Interstate; For-Hire; Authorized Passenger and Property
fmcsa_status: Active; authorized for passenger and property operations in interstate commerce
officers: John J. Corrado (President/CEO since 1995); John A. Corrado (founder, purchased company 1970)
registry_source: NY Department of State, Division of Corporations (DOS ID 104545; Domestic Business Corporation)
notes: Strong address match: 10 Moffitt Blvd, Bay Shore NY 11706. Legal name 'Suffolk Transportation Service Inc' (input shorthand 'Suffolk Transportation Systs'). Related affiliate Suffolk Bus Corp (USDOT 967086) shares same address but is an intrastate carrier with only 1 power unit on file (likely shell/affiliate). Fleet has grown from 35 school buses in 1970 to 1,400+ school buses, 80 transit buses, and 143 paratransit buses. Recent activity: 4 vehicle inspections, 4 driver inspections, 11 crashes (9 injury, 2 tow-away) in past 24 months, zero out-of-service violations.

name: H & L Bloom
